hero.subtitle: A light editorial homepage for a developer brand, shaped with calm whitespace, structured grids, and a more tactile visual rhythm.
hero.visualDescription: Soft industrial layout with bright surfaces, technical borders, and a subtle lime accent inspired by your design draft.
hero.availability: Available for selected collaborations, visual systems, and product-facing front-end work.

cta.yourProject: Let's work on your next project.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: I use code, structure, and visual rhythm to turn abstract ideas into digital experiences that feel clear, useful, and lasting.
about.sideNote: The same light editorial system continues here, with a calmer page about ambition, motivation, and the kind of work I want to keep building.
about.ambitionTitle: I want to build more than pages. I want to build digital work that keeps growing.
about.ambitionBody: I care about more than shipping features. I care about how information is understood, whether interactions feel natural, whether the interface has order, and whether a product can continue evolving over time. Every line of code should help a product express itself more clearly and more reliably.
about.originBody: I fell in love with coding because it turns ideas into something real. A thought, a logic flow, or an interface can slowly take shape through building and debugging. That process still keeps me excited.
about.visionBody: I want to keep working in the space where design sensitivity meets engineering discipline, building product pages and content systems that are beautiful, maintainable, and genuinely useful.
about.ctaTitle: If you care deeply about your product, I'd love to hear about it.

items.label: Principle One
items.title: Direction before decoration
items.body: I prefer to clarify intent, narrative, and hierarchy first, then shape the interface so design strengthens the message.

items.label: Principle Two
items.title: Code is part of the craft
items.body: Clear, maintainable, and evolvable implementation directly shapes how stable and efficient a product feels over time.

items.label: Principle Three
items.title: Iteration matters more than a perfect first pass
items.body: I believe in long-term refinement, letting a site gain character through careful updates to its details, pacing, and content.

links.label: Friendly links
links.title: External resources I use often and gladly recommend.
links.subtitle: These links reflect tools that shape my current workflow, from collaboration and front-end architecture to utility-first styling.

items.label: Collaboration
items.title: GitHub
items.body: A place to publish work, study good code, and stay connected to the wider developer community.

items.label: UI foundation
items.title: React
items.body: I use it to organize components, state, and page structure so interaction stays composable and maintainable.

items.label: Build workflow
items.title: Vite
items.body: Fast feedback matters. Vite keeps front-end development direct, lightweight, and pleasant to iterate on.

items.label: Style system
items.title: Tailwind CSS
items.body: It helps me turn spacing, hierarchy, and color decisions into a consistent system that lives directly in the code.

stack.label: Tech stack
stack.title: The tools I use most often in projects.
stack.subtitle: They mainly support front-end UI building, component structure, internationalization, and a smooth developer workflow.

home.statement: A brand is not just a logo.
home.statementBody: I shape clean interfaces, launch pages, and product presentations that feel more like systems than decoration.

services.title: Brand Strategy
services.description: Positioning, naming cues, and interface direction aligned to a sharper product voice.

services.title: Brand Design
services.description: A modular visual system with layout rules, type hierarchy, and tactile UI details.

services.title: Graphic Design
services.description: Key visuals, launch graphics, and content assets that stay consistent across product surfaces.

services.title: Monthly Support
services.description: Long-term UI iteration for new sections, campaigns, and content refreshes.

projects.sideBody: Meet our recent incubations and structured launch materials.
